con:part.con:content: <!--Published by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI's version is JAX-WS RI 2.2.9-b130926.1035 svn-revision#5f6196f2b90e9460065a4c2f4e30e065b245e51e.--> <!--Generated by JAX-WS RI (http://jax-ws.java.net). RI's version is JAX-WS RI 2.2.9-b130926.1035 svn-revision#5f6196f2b90e9460065a4c2f4e30e065b245e51e.--> <definitions targetNamespace="http://signerws.example.com/" name="SignerWsImplService" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:wsp1_2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:tns="http://signerws.example.com/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/"> <types> <xsd:schema> <xsd:import namespace="http://signerws.example.com/" schemaLocation="http://localhost:8080/signerws?xsd=1"/> </xsd:schema> </types> <message name="signDocument"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:signDocument"/> </message> <message name="signDocumentResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:signDocumentResponse"/> </message> <message name="Exception"> <part name="fault" element="tns:Exception"/> </message> <message name="signReport"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:signReport"/> </message> <message name="signReportResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:signReportResponse"/> </message> <portType name="ISignerWs"> <operation name="signDocument"> <input wsam:Action="http://signerws.example.com/ISignerWs/signDocumentRequest" message="tns:signDocument"/> <output wsam:Action="http://signerws.example.com/ISignerWs/signDocumentResponse" message="tns:signDocumentResponse"/> <fault message="tns:Exception" name="Exception" wsam:Action="http://signerws.example.com/ISignerWs/signDocument/Fault/Exception"/> </operation> <operation name="signReport"> <input wsam:Action="http://signerws.example.com/ISignerWs/signReportRequest" message="tns:signReport"/> <output wsam:Action="http://signerws.example.com/ISignerWs/signReportResponse" message="tns:signReportResponse"/> <fault message="tns:Exception" name="Exception" wsam:Action="http://signerws.example.com/ISignerWs/signReport/Fault/Exception"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="SignerWsImplPortBinding" type="tns:ISignerWs"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <operation name="signDocument"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="Exception"> <soap:fault name="Exception" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="signReport"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="Exception"> <soap:fault name="Exception" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> </binding> <service name="SignerWsImplService"> <port name="SignerWsImplPort" binding="tns:SignerWsImplPortBinding"> <soap:address location="http://localhost:8080/signerws"/> </port> </service> </definitions>
